query: OpenAI ChatGPT video generation features status after Sora shutdown
a_issues: A contains several low-reliability and contradictory claims. BigGo says Sora shutdown includes 'video generation features within ChatGPT,' but this is not an official source and adds dubious claims about a Disney deal. Bonega asserts OpenAI 'exits AI video generation entirely,' which overstates what can be supported from the anchor. The Pulse Gazette says Sora is being folded into ChatGPT and gives a March 31, 2026 timeline, which directly conflicts with the anchor stating the Sora web/app were discontinued April 26, 2026 and the API ends September 24, 2026. A also mixes rumor/speculation about ChatGPT integration with claims of complete removal.
b_issues: B is also built mostly on weak or unofficial sources. Its featured snippet and GLBGPT claim Sora was shut down on March 25, 2026 and that all ChatGPT video features were permanently removed, which conflicts with the anchor's official dates: Sora web/app discontinued April 26, 2026; API September 24, 2026. MindStudio says 'Sora is currently accessible to ChatGPT Plus and Pro subscribers,' contradicting the shutdown framing. Webiano references official docs and the September 24, 2026 API date, but the set overall is internally inconsistent and includes unsupported assertions about ChatGPT button removal.
reasoning: Neither result set cleanly enables a correct answer from reliable evidence alone. The core question is the status of ChatGPT video generation features after Sora shutdown. The official anchor confirms only that Sora web/app ended April 26, 2026 and the Sora API will end September 24, 2026. It does not clearly establish from these search sets whether ChatGPT retained, lost, or absorbed video generation features. A has some results claiming ChatGPT integration/folding-in, while others claim total discontinuation of ChatGPT video features. B has the opposite problem: it strongly claims permanent removal from ChatGPT, but uses unreliable sources and contradicts the official dates; another B result says Sora is still accessible to Plus/Pro users. Because both sets are contradictory and factually shaky on the exact ChatGPT feature status, neither is clearly better.
